# Release 2.0.0-beta.1
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.

This is still a bit of a W.I.P, detailed docs will come later...

## What's Changed
* Logic refactor (compiling only) by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/200
* Add dedicated compiler for definitions by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/201
* Remove non-whitespace requirement from function application by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/202
* Mypy by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/203
* Add Indexing of matrices by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/204
* Fix partial derivative of defined functions by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/205


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.4.1...2.0.0-beta.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 1.4.0
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.

## What's Changed

* Reimplement _BRACE_SURROUND_TEXT with relative group references by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/176
* add vector cross product
* Integrate parts of the physics package:
  * Note that `d` can no longer be used as the differential symbol, `\dd` should be used instead.
* fix not being able to undefine default definitions
* Add python socks as a dependency by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/184
* Add more unit aliases and add electron, proton and neutron mass constants (`m_e`, `m_p`, `m_n`)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 1.3.0
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.

## What's Changed
* All modals can now be confirmed by hitting the 'enter' key, by @alexanderNB in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/163

* Constants (euler, imaginary unit and pi) can now be redefined https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/170

* Latex comments are now ignored by the parser https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/171

## What's Fixed
* Undefining an undefined variable no longer produces an error https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/169

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0
releases.name: Release 1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 1.2.1
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.

## What's Fixed
* Physical constants are now converted to numerical values during unit conversions https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/152
* Sums and products (`\sum`, `\prod`) now take an entire term as its argument, instead of the first factor in a term https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/154 and https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/158
* Remove `{(^|_) . (C|P) _ .}` syntax for permutations and combinations as this caused some issues when using `C` or `P` as symbols https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/155


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 1.2.0
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.


## What's Changed
* Matrix environments now persists during evaluation, instead of defaulting to `matrix` (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/111)
* Add support for simplification of logical propositions and generation of truth tables (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/109)
* Error messages are now more user friendly (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/116)
* Added Taylor polynomials (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/123)
* Symbols can now be prefixed with `\delta` (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/145)
* '~' can now be used to align LaTeX expressions (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/147)
* `\text` and other variants are now ignored instead of producing errors (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/121)
* Added dedicated doc files for various subjects (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/127)
* Long running commands can now be interrupted https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/128

### What's Fixed

* Fix '=' not being allowed in variable expressions (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/115)


### Codebase Changes

* Add code quality checks (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/98, https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/136, https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/138)
* Message handling is now concurrent (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/125)
* Definitions have been refactored (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/134)
* The plugin now has a timeout for exiting the Sympy client (https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/122)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.description:
# Release 1.2.0-beta.1
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.


## What's Changed
* Permissions Hotfix (#107) by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/108
* Add forced ruff lint on all pull requests by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/98
* Matrix Environment Persists During Evaluation by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/111
* Add Propositional Logic Support by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/109
* Fix '=' not being allowed in variable expressions by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/115
* Better Error Messages by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/116
* Add Anti Flicker Support by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/118
* Ignore Text by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/121
* Add sympy client exit timeout by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/122
* Add Taylor Polynomials by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/123
* Threaded Client Refactor by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/125
* Handler Interruption by @zarstensen in https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/128


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0-beta.1

releases.description:
# Release 1.1.0
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.


## What's Changed
* FiniteSet solutions are now simplified https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/92
* Improved error messages https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/93
* Add combinatorial and gamma functions #85
* Add divisibility functions #88
* Add re, im, arg and sgn #89
* Add sech, csch, coth and their inverses https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/90
* Improved formatting of latex output
* Setup script now works if this repo is added as a submodule on another repo

* Fixed not being able to use multiple sequential align tokens https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/86
* Fixed integrals and partial derivatives only working in very simple cases
* Recapitalize plugin name https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/pull/97

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-latex-math/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

# Release 0.4.0
## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.

## What's Changed
* Added function substitution.
* Implemented new unit system, allowing picking specific unit system subsets of SI.
* Release assets are now automatically downloaded on plugin load.
* LaTeX output is now formatted.

## What's Fixed
* Fixed quick derivative not working.
* Fixed units not working with matrices.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-obsimat-plugin/compare/0.3.3...0.4.0

- Fix \text{...} sometimes not being removed from latex output.
- Fix being unable to chain more than 2 relations in a single expression.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 0.3.1

## Usage

See [README](README.md) for usage.

## Changes
- Reworked units.
- - Improved unit conversion
- - Units now need to be excluded, instead of included, by default.
- Added new evaluate modes (evalf, expand, factor, apart and convert units).
- If a selection is currently present in the document, any evaluate command now uses the selected text, instead of the math block the cursor is inside, for evaluation.
- Greek symbols can now be used as variables.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-obsimat-plugin/compare/0.2.0...0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 0.1.0

## Changes
- Added many features to sympy's lark parser including but not limited to:
   - More rigorous implicit adjacent multiplication, and detection of multi letter symbols.
   - Norm and Dot product for Matricies.
   - Cases and Align environments are now parsed as system of equations / expressions, the same is true for chained relations.
- Added a new Solve modal which allows selection of multiple symbols and specification of a solution domain.
- Added convert latex to sympy command.
- Integrated symbol and variable substitution in the transformer process, leading to more consistent substitution results.
- Plugin asset uploaded to releases now require **NO** additional setup after being extracted into a vault's plugin folder.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zarstensen/obsidian-obsimat-plugin/compare/0.0.1...0.1.0
